summary: Tested backend (5/5 pytest passed) and frontend (all critical UI flows passed) for the portfolio/CV app. Health, contact POST (201) + persistence GET, invalid email 422, missing fields 422 all pass. Frontend: all sections render, all data-testids present, theme toggle works (toggles .dark class on <html>), Download CV buttons call window.print(), testimonials next/prev cycles quotes, contact form validates empty submission (no POST, shows error toast) and submits valid data (POST 201 + success toast). No console errors.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid='header-download-btn'] invokes window.print() TWICE per single click (hero-download-cv-btn invokes it once). Likely duplicate onClick wiring or double event binding.

issues: The hero section element does not expose id='hero' (other sections do). Anchor links / scroll-to-hero won't target it. Consider adding id='hero' to the Hero <section>.

action_items: Investigate why header-download-btn triggers window.print() twice per click (check Header.jsx onClick handler binding).
Add id='hero' to the Hero section element for anchor navigation consistency (other sections #about, #experience, ... have ids).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: `logger` is defined AFTER `app.include_router` and AFTER it's referenced inside the /contact route. It works because the route runs at request time (logger is a module-global by then), but the code reads brittle. Move logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger(__name__) above the route definitions.
server.py: Uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); prefer lifespan context manager.
server.py: CORSMiddleware added AFTER include_router — currently works but conventionally added before routes.
ContactMessage.created_at is stored as ISO string rather than a datetime — consistent but limits query/sort by date as Date type.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed contact messages via POST /api/contact during tests; persisted in MongoDB collection contact_messages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py. All endpoints (/api/, /api/contact GET/POST) verified. Frontend public URL works. Test data uses TEST_ prefix. Hero section lacks id='hero' but buttons work. Header download button triggers print() twice (minor).
